checks.description: Ensure that boundary-value inputs do not cause undefined or X states in mul_out.
checks.pass_condition: mul_out must be a defined 8-bit value (no X or Z) after each boundary stimulus.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge_001 plan drives boundary patterns to mul_a and mul_b.

checks.description: Verify that after a single legal multiplication operation, mul_out stabilizes to the correct product value within a conservative observation window.
checks.pass_condition: The recorded mul_out matches the arithmetic product of the driven mul_a and mul_b and remains stable for at least two consecutive clock cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When basic_001 plan applies its stimulus program.
